macro.name: TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ("Our PCG implementation provides expected results for known seeds", "[rng]")

macro.name: TEMPLATE_TEST_CASE
macro.argument_list: ("uniform_floating_point_distribution never returns infs from finite range", "[rng][distribution][floating-point][approvals]", float, double)
